# hanja-gloss-swarm — data license

**Source:** first-party — generated by HanjaKey's own LLM subagent swarm (spec 005 ②). NOT third-party.
**License:** MIT — same as the project `LICENSE`. The glosses are short generated 훈음 (2–4 words, e.g.
`마실 음`), not copied from any dictionary's prose, so they carry only thin copyright and stay MIT.

`hanja_gloss.txt` fills 훈음 for single Hanja that had an EMPTY libhangul gloss and no clean-licensed
overlay after spec 004, limited to user-visible entries (ranked tier 0–2 + unranked readings). Format
`읽기:한자:훈음`. Built by `scripts/build_gloss_compile.py` from `docs/specs/005-candidate-quality/swarm-raw/gloss-*.json`
(`status: full` only; `미상` / `wrong_reading` excluded). Ghost/unknown chars stay `뜻 미상` by design.

- Generated: 2026-06-22. 1,586 entries.
- Pipeline + provenance: `docs/specs/005-candidate-quality/`.
